title: Relocating a Premium Café or Roastery in Bole: Safeguarding Italian Espresso Machines and Bulk Green Coffee
excerpt: Premium café roastery Bole relocation: Italian espresso machines, bulk green coffee storage, commercial coffee equipment moving, specialty café logistics Addis.
content:
Relocating a premium café or roastery in Bole: safeguarding Italian espresso machines and bulk green coffee

Bole premium cafés compete on crema and origin story—Italian espresso machines worth more than rent, green coffee bags breathing until roast. Relocation must protect boilers, group heads, and humidity-sensitive beans while minimizing days without morning regulars' macchiato.

This guide safeguards espresso equipment and bulk green coffee during Bole café and roastery moves.

Espresso machine protocol

  • Licensed technician drain, disconnect, secure transit bolts per OEM.
  • Upright transport always; custom crate if machine tall dual-group.
  • Group heads capped; steam wands padded; electrical cord bagged labeled.
  • Recommission and pressure test before public reopen—water quality check new site.

Grinders and support equipment

Burr grinders locked; hopper empty; blades never against metal strap. Water filtration and softener tanks drained. POS and tablet hand-carry.

Green coffee bulk handling

Breathable sacks upright on pallets—no airtight plastic long storage mold risk. Climate truck preferred Kremt. FIFO order preserved—lot labels facing out reload. Roasted stock separate climate—consume or gift before move if volume small.

Glassware and retail

Cup sets dish packs; retail bags sealed display-ready. Merchandise fixtures labeled disassembly.

Customer continuity Bole

Social sign "moving week"; pop-up cart partner if loyal base; grand reopening espresso calibration public—trust restored in first pull.

Regulatory and lease

Food license address update; health inspection timing; grease trap new site if kitchen scale.

Active Movers café commercial tier

Disclose machine weight and green bag count—technician coordination recommended vendor list.

Conclusion

Bole café moves protect OEM espresso discipline, breathable green coffee pallets, and quick recommission—premium reputation survives relocation when crema quality returns day one.
author: Active Movers Team
